S.FORM: == u zuma a kamu: == nu Hulam: śĻĮŚĆô nu Amilika: tablespoon nu Zipun: „ÉÜ„Éľ„ÉĖ„Éę„āĻ„Éó„Éľ„É≥ u canan ku ngelab ňź 15śĮęŚćá. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganňź ==
S.PHON: == u zuma a kamu: == nu ńßur~…ĺam: ** nu amir~…ĺika: tabr~…ĺ…ôspoon nu zipun: ******** u ¶anan ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺab * ****. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan* == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan* ==
S.FORM: == u zuma a kamu: == nu Hulam: śĻĮŚĆô nu Amilika: tablespoon nu Zipun: „ÉÜ„Éľ„ÉĖ„Éę„āĻ„Éó„Éľ„É≥ u canan ku ngelab ňź 15śĮęŚćá. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganňź ==
S.PHON: == u zuma a kamu: == nu ńßur~…ĺam: ** nu amir~…ĺika: tabr~…ĺ…ôspoon nu zipun: ******** u ¶anan ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺab * ****. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan* == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan* ==
